name: Meatballs with Milk Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the beef, vegetables, breadcrumbs, yogurt, thyme and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Form into meatballs.
3. Cook in a covered skillet over medium flame, turning carefully to brown.
4. Remove meatballs from skillet and set aside.
5. Pour milk into skillet and bring to a boil.
6. Add bouillon and cook until dissolved.
7. Dissolve flour in sherry and add a bit at a time until gravy is thickened.
8. Return meatballs to gravy and cook until heated through.
9. Serve over noodles.
Per serving: 429 Calories; 24g Fat (54% calories from fat); 27g Protein; 20g Carbohydrate; 88mg Cholesterol; 301mg Sodium
Recipe By: Alison Meyer
Serving Size: 2
Preparation Time: 0:00
